privacy_note: Metadata-only source audit. Reports source file paths, line numbers, timestamp field names, and guard status only. It skips memory, runtime, data, tests, ops, logs, and generated folders; it does not read or print memory bodies, raw QQ payloads, timestamp values, tokens, secrets, or source-line text.
